title: The Matrix
overview: A hacker discovers the world is a simulation and joins a rebellion against the machines controlling humanity.

title: Interstellar
overview: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

title: Inception
overview: A skilled thief uses dream-sharing technology to plant an idea into the mind of a powerful executive.

title: The Dark Knight
overview: Batman faces the Joker, a chaotic criminal who pushes Gotham to the edge.

title: Forrest Gump
overview: A kind-hearted man unintentionally witnesses and influences several decades of American history.

title: Pulp Fiction
overview: The lives of multiple criminals intertwine through sharply written and unexpectedly funny stories.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
overview: Two imprisoned men bond over years, finding redemption through acts of decency and hope.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
overview: A hobbit begins a dangerous journey to destroy a powerful ring before evil can claim it.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
overview: Middle-earth stands on the brink of war as the final battle for the ring unfolds.

title: Parasite
overview: A poor family gradually infiltrates the lives of a wealthy household with unexpected consequences.

title: Joker
overview: A failed comedian spirals into a dark identity that shocks Gotham City.

title: Fight Club
overview: An office worker forms an underground fight club that evolves into something far more dangerous.

title: Gladiator
overview: A betrayed Roman general rises as a gladiator to challenge a corrupt emperor.

title: Django Unchained
overview: A freed slave partners with a bounty hunter to rescue his wife from a brutal plantation owner.

title: City of God
overview: Two young men choose very different paths while growing up amid violence in the favelas of Rio.

title: Saving Private Ryan
overview: A group of soldiers venture behind enemy lines to bring a paratrooper home during World War II.

title: Avengers: Endgame
overview: The Avengers assemble one last time to reverse a catastrophic loss and restore the universe.

title: The Wolf of Wall Street
overview: A stockbroker rises and crashes spectacularly while indulging in excess and corruption.

title: Whiplash
overview: A driven drummer and an unforgiving instructor push each other to dangerous extremes.

title: Avengers: Infinity War
overview: The Avengers and their allies try to stop Thanos from collecting all six Infinity Stones.

title: Coco
overview: A young boy travels to the Land of the Dead to uncover his family's forgotten story.

title: Avatar: The Way of Water
overview: Jake Sully lives with his newfound family formed on the extrasolar moon Pandora. Once a familiar threat returns to finish what was previously started, Jake must work with Neytiri and the army of the Na'vi race to protect their home.

title: Oppenheimer
overview: The story of American scientist, J. Robert Oppenheimer, and his role in the development of the atomic bomb.
cast: Cillian Murphy|Emily Blunt|Matt Damon|Robert Downey Jr.

title: John Wick: Chapter 4
overview: John Wick uncovers a path to defeating The High Table. But before he can earn his freedom, Wick must face off against a new enemy with powerful alliances across the globe and forces that turn old friends into foes.

title: Dune
overview: A noble family becomes embroiled in a war for control over the galaxy's most valuable asset while its heir becomes troubled by visions of a dark future.

title: The Batman
overview: When a sadistic serial killer begins murdering key political figures in Gotham, Batman is forced to investigate the city's hidden corruption and question his family's involvement.
